title: Minecraft Immersion +
description: This mod pack focuses on enhacning the game with alot of quality of life updates and things i thought shouldve been in the base game
body:
![Minecraft immersion + logo with the background being a cherry blossom biome with the sun shining above the logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd4fa47591b9821ef68169cce187cde1837d26d_0.webp)

This mod pack is my own personal creation which i thought, why not share it with the world for other people to enjoy.

This mod pack focuses on enhacning the game with alot of quality of life updates and things i thought shouldve been in the base game, making it satisying, fluid, beautiful and enjoyable to play.

This is my first ever mod pack and it will not be updated as in my eyes its perfect as it is and should be played as it currently is, other then that please enjoy my mod pack and i hope you like it.

I reccomend using a shader to get the best experience, my personal favourite is photon which is already in the mod pack along with other shaders to custimise to your liking, if youd like the latest version of photon you can get it here - [Photon shaders](https://github.com/sixthsurge/photon)

Sincerely MiNiNinja13O8
